artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2023-12-23
artifacts.excerpt:
as a man it’s hard to spot because this side of them surfaces only when they’re one-on-one with a woman, not in mixed company. ie they’re not likely to subject me to creepy vibes

so i don’t know what to look for in a man that would clue me in on this

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2024-07-16
artifacts.excerpt:
—but they don’t have 7 decades of experience; they have 1 year of experience 70 times, by refusing to accept responsibility for the results

and i think, please don’t let me get stuck like this. i’ve got to keep taking responsibility for my outcomes & going beyond myself
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, think, want.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2024-07-16
artifacts.excerpt:
though i don’t often seek advice from elderly people anymore, i used to — and the counsel they gave was terrible: rife with blind assumptions, ignorant of the changing world, fraught with self-coercion and fear of the unconscious mind

(the latter may be the crux of it)
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, think, want.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2024-07-16
artifacts.excerpt:
i don’t want to be cynical about the elderly — i realize that in my current job (entertainment & luxury travel), i meet a disproportionate number of people in these failure modes

but the general picture i get from friends’ parents and social media isn’t any brighter
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, know, think, want.

planets.name: Way
planets.summary: Archive cluster around way: 562 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Way receipt from 2024-01-10
artifacts.excerpt: work is punishment for being too dumb to find a lazy way out
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: way, better, love, own.

artifacts.title: Way receipt from 2024-10-16
artifacts.excerpt:
these ideas want you dead: that you cannot turn to others for help; that they are hurting you by showing care the *wrong way* and therefore you must step further away. that nobody could or would truly help.

these are cognitive distortions of a mental illness, not your feelings.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: way, better, love, own.

artifacts.title: Way receipt from 2025-07-05
artifacts.excerpt:
so, what did that replacement look like?

first of all, it started with *acceptance* for the present state of affairs.

i had to accept that i had a compulsion to control, to perfect, to manipulate others and myself. and i had to accept that i couldn't control my way out of it.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: way, better, love, own.

artifacts.title: Way receipt from 2024-01-13
artifacts.excerpt:
need to make a [taps sign] post about the Portable Jung cause this comes up often

Jung’s writing is some of the densest prose i’ve ever forced myself to read — and possibly *the* most helpful

but there’s no way i could have understood him without Joseph Campbell’s editing https://t.co/JRkfcW6wpi
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: way, better, love, own.

artifacts.title: Time receipt from 2023-10-26
artifacts.excerpt:
two nights running, i've woken up at 4am with this charge in my body evoking memories of early childhood trauma

years ago, i'd have considered it a problem. "what's wrong with me? why am i sleeping wrong?"

now i recognize the gift. "what a perfect time to relearn that i'm safe"
